commentaries.author: Cyprian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Also in the same place: "I am Alpha and Omega, the first and the last, the beginning and the end. Blessed are they that do His commandments, that they may have power over the tree of life."

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: I am alpha and omega. See Chap. i. 8. (Witham)
